## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Code / CLI
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Template or workflow
- [ ] Synthetic case study
- [ ] Maintenance

## Responsible-use checklist

- [ ] The change uses neutral technical language.
- [ ] The change does not infer author intent.
- [ ] No real paper data, author names, DOIs, copyrighted PDFs, or proprietary datasets are added unless explicitly appropriate and legally reusable.
- [ ] Synthetic examples are clearly marked as synthetic.

## Validation

Describe how the change was checked.

```bash
pytest tests/
```

## Notes for reviewers

Mention any files or decisions that need special attention.
